G0.label:
case cons
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
f : α → List β
l₂ : List α
head✝ : α
tail✝ : List α
tail_ih✝ : flatMap f (tail✝ ++ l₂) = flatMap f tail✝ ++ flatMap f l₂
⊢ flatMap f (head✝ :: tail✝ ++ l₂) = flatMap f (head✝ :: tail✝) ++ flatMap f l₂

G1.label:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
f : α → List β
l₂ : List α
head : α
tail : List α
tail_ih : flatMap f (tail ++ l₂) = flatMap f tail ++ flatMap f l₂
⊢ flatMap f (head :: tail ++ l₂) = flatMap f (head :: tail) ++ flatMap f l₂
